feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Our Monkey, Our Circus
entry.summary:
Author: gardenfire45

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,014Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 106

Summary: Alfred wants the Batfamily to get along, So Bruce made a Groupchat hoping everyone to behave. (He put too much hope into it, no one is behaving). It end up as we all expected, Chaos... At least it's entertaining...  -   Harleen: Monkeys are terrifying creature ngl Harleen: did you know Chimpanzees rips off the balls of their rivals or enemy? Harleen: gruesome shit.   Jason: You learn new things every day   Tim: I do not need to read that at fucking 10 pm in patrol night.   Steph: Humans can do it too if they're not a coward or afraid to be called gay Steph: but people are cowards, Start ripping off the enemies balls!!! Be the dominant Chimpanzees!!!   Cass: on it.

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,051Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 259

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I’ll sing until I remember
entry.summary:
Author: Hyperobsessedfanficwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,607Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Jason’s been dead for years. Bruce hasn’t been the same since. When he heard the melody he’d sing for him how could he not investigate?!

entry.title: I survived, but what for?
entry.summary:
Author: ThisIsNotTheWriterYouAreLookingFor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,221Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 9

Summary: On that faithful day in Ethiopia Batman was not late to save Robin. Little did he guess that this would just be the start of a long journey full of misery and heart ache, that at the end, it all may have been worth it… But not so necessary.   a.k.a. Bruce saves Jason, but that forces him to come to the terms of his own demons, in order to help Jason with his. And Jason is recovering from the murder attempt, and has a terrible time in the meanwhile.

entry.title: The Heroes I Raised
entry.summary:
Author: Sweet_Ru07

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,217Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 607

Summary: when a new magical threat arrives in Gotham, all it's heroes gather to confront it despite their strained relationship with one another. however, despite their best efforts, tragedy strikes. And Bruce Wayne, surrounded by the bodies of his children, is given a chance to try again. with his dying breath he vows, he will do better, no matter what it takes, he will save them this time.The concept of this fic is inspired by the webtoon "The S-Classes Raised" but does not require prior knowledge of it, this is my first time writing for these characters and I accept any constructive criticisms. will update the tags as I go

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,276Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: "An Undead Wedding Day,"
entry.summary:
Author: l0singmym_nd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 515Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Elliot was your average high school student. Bullying because of him being trans, and basically the parent in his house, because his parents are drug users and alcoholics. But when he and Tim Drake, son of Bruce Wayne, get partnered up to parent an egg child for their health class, Elliot has to learn to let people help once in a while, and Tim has to learn to trust. Will they? Won't they? Stay tuned!!

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: Undercoverweirdo6967

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,891Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 24

Summary: Tim and Kon are secretly dating behind Bruce, and everyone's back. Once some hints and clues start dropping and eventually when Bruce starts picking up on it, drama and chaos unfolds. While Bruce is contemplating the new piece of information he just discovered, Clark Kent is getting awfully close to him. While all of this drama is going on, joker breaking out of Arkham is the cherry on top. Chaos and Smut unfold.

entry.title: Childish crushes
entry.summary:
Author: Cringe_Fella

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,916Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 1,800

Summary: Instead of lunging at him, the monster stumbled, as it tried to stand, and Clark saw as a child's leg slipped out of a big black boot before tangling in a yellow belt, small, very childish hands trying and failing to catch it. And maybe… And maybe it wasn't a monster at all, because as Clark watched, transfixed, the kid - because it had to be a kid, he didn't seem to be older than Clark- face planted on the floor without making even a single noise. _______ Or; a magical mishap accidently turns the World's Finest into an 8 and a 9 year old. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 213,295Chapters: 40/?Kudos: 365

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Mr. and Mrs. Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: GothamNocturne

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,441Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 31

Summary: **This is the sequel to Bruce and Selina** Bruce Wayne finally chooses the life he once believed he couldn't have - a wife, a daughter, and a world he's trying to hold together. But peace in Gotham never comes without a cost. When an old debt pulls Selina into something she can't walk away from, secrets begin to fracture the foundation of both their marriage and the Justice League. As whispers of invasion spread and trust begins to erode, Bruce is forced to make an impossible choice: Stand with the world. Or stand with his family. Because sometimes the greatest threat isn't the one descending from the stars - It's the one everyone believes is already inside your home. And this time, the cowl may not survive the cost.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Quarantine: Batfamily Edition
entry.summary:
Author: AJwarrior

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,493Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 22

Summary: Dick's got hidden trauma, Jason doesn't know how to deal with his own death, Cass wants to be safe, Tim overworks himself, Steph has mommy issues (and daddy issues, and other issues), Duke feels out of place, and Damian can't figure out how to connect. They've all got problems. Bruce is so tired. Pair all of that with a Lockdown, and Gotham's finest vigilantes are going to need a lot of hot cocoa and movie nights to get through this one. ---- The batfamily deals with quarantine. Forced into proximity with each other, Bruce and his kids get into various shenanigans, heart-to-hearts, and movie nights, while also dealing with a very different Gotham than the one they are used to.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Ajusshi from Gotham?
entry.summary:
Author: maemae18

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,515Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 21

Summary: Jimmy Fallon just dropped the bombshell of the century: 4K footage of Bruce Wayne's hidden activities in South Korea. While the world is obsessed with the "Mystery Ajusshi," the residents of Wayne Manor are dealing with the horrifying realization that their father has the range of a virtuoso and the footwork of a main dancer. Bruce maintains it was a publicity stunt and nothing more. Jason is already printing the "Hyung" t-shirts. or Bruce Wayne 'had' a Kpop phase that nobody knew about until it was finally released.

entry.title: Chapter 2; The Second Knight
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,402Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Bruce Wayne is many things, he was the protector of Gotham, an orphan, a father and a hero, but the worst thing that he could be, was old, with his allies spread out or gone, he decided to initiate Safeguard 27, an ambitious project that would provide Gotham an eternal protector, but would the protector be ready or even willing to protect his home? Only time and faith would tell for the future of Batman.

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,375Chapters: 15/25Kudos: 150

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life? Also this is a crossover, you just don’t know it. CURRENTLY REVISING STORY!! NO NEW CHAPTERS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE!!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: Ella_Katz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,479Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 54

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

entry.title: She broken on my ribs till I pneumothorax
entry.summary:
Author: Ooooooooooshinything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,391Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 160

Summary: Jason was tired. I mean. He was always tired but right now more than usual because right now he was chained to a chair.But the justice league.In space.In their super secret headquarters in space. Or Jason Todd gets his shot rocked by the justice league while Batman is off in space and it turns out the cure to daddy issues is life threatening injuries :D   (The title is in the works maybe probably I just didn’t know what else to call it lmao)

entry.title: I Wear The Black
entry.summary:
Author: p1tufina

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,581Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 712

Summary: The people Bruce had met did not seem bad. For all the terrifying skills displayed, Gotham's vigilantes behaved like (and this wasn't a topic Bruce was overly familiar with), well, like family. Still, the sight of them, dressed in those kevlar suits, sent a wave of disgust up his throat. Even when he tried to swallow it back, the feeling lingered, churning and swirling in his stomach each time he glanced at those symbols. Nightwing's blue bird. Batgirl's yellow bat. Robin's logo. Even Red Hood's graffiti-painted red bat. ... Why? Or Absolute Batman lands in the Mainline universe and learns that maybe his mission doesn't need to be a lonely one.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Culturual Significance of Chain Restaurants
entry.summary:
Author: Aimlessrambling

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,567Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: By process of elimination, Barbara discovers that she is the only member of the Batfamily who has ever been to a Cheesecake Factory. This situation needs to be rectified immediately.
